description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a robust wooden handle and a metallic head. The handle is straight, slightly tapered, and appears to be made from a light-colored hardwood, providing a comfortable grip for manual tasks. The head is forged from steel, with one side presenting a flat striking face for driving nails and the opposite side forming a curved claw for prying and nail removal. The transition between the handle and the head is seamless, with the head securely mounted onto the handle. The hammer shows no visible signs of branding, wear, or damage, and its surfaces are matte with a natural wood grain and a slightly textured metal finish. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for general construction, carpentry, or household repairs in urban environments.
description: A traditional claw hammer with a wooden handle and a steel head, featuring a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal. The surfaces are matte and show no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the steel head with both the striking face and the claw visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight wooden handle and the profile of the hammer head, with the curved claw and striking face clearly defined.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the width of the handle and the full curvature of the claw, as well as the flat striking face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other profile of the hammer head and handle.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle, slightly tapered, smooth with visible wood grain, no additional grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: claw hammer head, forged steel, with a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw for nail removal on the other
